Fraction comparison.description: Compare fractions and reason about which fraction is larger or smaller.
examples: use common denominators to compare fractions
rewrite fractions with the same value

Fraction addition.description: Add and subtract fractions using common denominators.

Dividing fractions.description: Divide fractions using visual models, measurement division, and reciprocal reasoning.
examples: how many unit fraction groups fit inside a fraction

Ratios.description: Understand, simplify, and reason about ratios and equivalent ratios.

Unit rates.description: Find rates per one unit, such as miles per hour or price per item.

Fraction-decimal relationships.description: Connect fractions and decimals as equivalent representations.

Data and statistics.description: Analyze data using measures such as mean, median, mode, and range.

Word problems.description: Represent and solve real-world math problems with equations or models.
examples: write an equation for the situation
